commands.failure: RUN_WEB_P0_TRUE_SERVICE_SMOKE=true is required because this smoke creates production-like test data

decision.reason: The configured DATABASE_URL points to a remote Supabase Postgres host, local backend health is unavailable, mutating opt-in is disabled, and Admin E2E credentials are missing. Running the smoke would create production-like users, cases, evidence, chat rooms and judgments against a target that has not been confirmed safe for test data.
required_before_pass_artifact: Confirm target DB/API is an approved dev or release-like environment for mutating smoke.
Start or provide reachable backend health and ready endpoints.
Set AI_MOCK=true for no-cost release-like smoke unless paid AI verification is explicitly intended.
Provide WEB_P0_SMOKE_REPORT_PATH=docs/核心開發文件/90-證據與盤點/環境與發版驗證/Web-P0-True-Service-<timestamp>.json.
Provide E2E_ADMIN_EMAIL and E2E_ADMIN_PASSWORD or equivalent credential-backed Admin pass evidence.

non_claims: This preflight is not a pass artifact.
This preflight does not prove Web P0 true-service completion.
This preflight does not replace Admin credential-backed E2E evidence.
linked_todo: docs/核心開發文件/07-待處理問題與治理/已處理/WebP0流程E2E真服務證據缺口待辦-2026-05-10.md
